## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.7

### đź› ď¸Ź Fixes
- Restores SBS50 child-device detail loading across detector models so battery, RF level, report time, CO fields, and related device entities are populated again.
- Normalizes APK child-device payload aliases such as `deviceSN`, `deviceSn`, `devSerialNumber`, `serialNumber`, `sn`, and child-keyed shadow records.
- Maps APK `isAlarm` reports back into Home Assistant alarm status for child detectors.
- Restores CO detector value handling, including CO ppm, CO Level, CO peak, and long-term statistics metadata.
- Pre-creates SBS50 base station diagnostics and supported settings before late shadow data arrives.
- Removes app-triggered self-test command buttons for models where the APK exposes self-test notifications but no reachable test command path.

### đź§Ş Validation
- Adds regression coverage for SBS50 child details, CO field normalization, alarm aliasing, Wi-Fi mute paths, and unsupported self-test command cleanup.
